title: Characterization and Management of Cytokine Release Syndrome From the MonumenTAL-1 Study of Talquetamab in Patients With Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma.
abstract: Cytokine release syndrome (CRS) is a common adverse event associated with T-cell redirection therapies (TCRT), including talquetamab, the first GPRC5D × CD3 bispecific antibody approved for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma (RRMM). We describe CRS with talquetamab and implications for clinical practice.
trial_name: Talquetamab plus Teclistamab in relapsed/refractory MM
